arts.sum: Jadon Sancho was persona non grata at Man United after a spat with Erik ten Hag, however, Enzo Maresca is delighted with his attitude and application since joining Chelsea on loan in the summer. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Bournemouth predicted as Premier League classic unfolds
arts.sum: After putting an end to their winless run on the weekend, Chelsea will be looking to pick up a much-needed three points against Bournemouth in the Premier League later today. The victory ended the Blues' four-game winless run across all competitions, and Enzo Maresca will be hoping his side can build on the weekend's win when they welcome Bournemouth to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: What Mathys Tel has said on his future as Chelsea transfer clue emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked with Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel. The Blues will make an offer for the forward should Bayern give Chelsea any sort of encouragement that the teenager is available this month.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals Christopher Nkunku transfer truth as Chelsea chase Mathys Tel signing
arts.sum: Reports earlier this month claimed Nkunku informed the Blues of his desire to leave, with former club Paris Saint-Germain said to be interested in the attacker, because he was not featuring as regularly as he would like. Enzo Maresca has revealed there has been no conversation between him and Christopher Nkunku over the Frenchman's future at Chelsea.
